original_query: SELECT "t5"."JOB" FROM (SELECT "JOB" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t5" FULL JOIN (SELECT "NAME" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t6" ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."NAME" GROUP BY "t5"."JOB"
rewritten_query:
SELECT "t5"."JOB"
FROM (SELECT "JOB" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t5"
FULL JOIN (SELECT "NAME" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t6" 
ON "t5"."JOB" = "t6"."NAME";

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Removed redundant outer GROUP BY clause since the subqueries are already grouped by their respective keys (JOB and NAME), and the FULL JOIN on these keys would not produce duplicates that need to be grouped again.
